retry_reason: If dma_get_any_slave_channel fails due to no available channel, a channel may become free later, so retrying the xlate call could succeed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to translate device tree arguments to a DMA channel, involving error checking, obtaining a channel via dma_get_any_slave_channel (which acquires a reference), and configuring per-channel parameters. The refcount increment is incidental to obtaining the channel, and the function contains significant non-refcount logic (parsing, config writes).
